title: Cataclysm Weaponery
description: New ignitium weapons for L_Ender's Cataclysm mod
body:
![Cataclysm Weaponery Logo](https://imgur.com/56eunZh.png)

New ignitium weapons for L_Ender's Cataclysm mod

Requirement : **[L_Ender's Cataclysm]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l_ender-s-cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm(cataclysm)))** mod is required in order to use this addon !

This mod adds new craftable weapons for Ignitium ore in the game, such as a sword, a pickaxe, ...

In the 3.0.0 update, we added 3D models for the weapons, take a look :

![https://i.imgur.com/tcoD4tL.gif](https://i.imgur.com/tcoD4tL.gif)

**Here some in-game pictures of the recipe :**

![Ignitium Sword](https://i.imgur.com/fTHHwi9.png)

![Ignitium Pickaxe](https://i.imgur.com/qL1EuZp.png)

![Ignitium Axe](https://i.imgur.com/FCXRJvV.png)

![Ignitium Shovel](https://i.imgur.com/CV9GdSV.png)

![Ignitium Hoe](https://i.imgur.com/OcRPHDj.png)

**The addon is _now available_ on Aternos servers !**
